note: Reviewed locally with the render-visual-reviewer rubric. No delegated subagent was used because this turn did not explicitly authorize multi-agent delegation.

artifact.role: AI-generated schematic roadmap, not empirical evidence

visible_evidence: The four-stage left-to-right method chain is visible at ACL page scale.
Major labels are legible: USD / MDL Assets, noMDL Conversion, Paired VLM Evidence, and InternNav Evidence.
The footer claim boundary remains readable and states that frozen paired evidence supports quantitative claims while selected rollouts are qualitative.
SR, SPL, and NE appear as neutral metric tiles without direction arrows.
Navigation overlays use green and purple paths, with no red trajectory that could be confused with material fallback.
risks: The panel is AI-generated schematic art, so it must remain captioned as a roadmap rather than measured render evidence.
Some small internal text in the VLM question bubble is not evidence-bearing and should not be relied on for claims.
promotion_decision: Promote v13 over v12 because it has lower microtext density and a cleaner page-scale structure while preserving the same paper story.
